item.title: Glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists are associated with reduced risk of developing substance use disorders
item.description: 1. Use of glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor agonists was associated with reduced risk of developing substance use disorders among US veterans w...

item.title: Oral infigratinib boosts growth velocity in achondroplasia study
item.description: 1. Oral infigratinib achieved the highest growth velocity reported to date in a randomized achondroplasia trial, growing 2.10 cm/year faster than plac...

item.title: Computed tomography angiography of the head and neck may inform emergency management in patients with suspected stroke
item.description: 1. Computed tomography angiography of the head and neck (CTAHN) is most likely to reveal an acute finding that changes emergency management in patient...

item.title: 2 Minute Medicine Rewind March 9, 2026
item.description: Sex-Specific Associations of α-Synuclein Pathology With Tau Accumulation 1. α-synuclein pathology was associated with faster tau accumulation in women...

item.title: The quadrivalent human papillomavirus vaccine provides effective and durable protection against invasive cervical cancer
item.description: 1. In this cohort study, the quadrivalent human papillomavirus (HPV) vaccine provides strong, long-lasting protection against invasive cervical cancer...
